ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "tier" TEXT /* Tier of the tournament (e.g., B, C) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_money" TEXT /* Prize money awarded in the tournament */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the organizations table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tournaments table */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the player in the tournament */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the player in the tournament */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Total score of the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the player */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Current rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_earnings" (
  "earning_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each earning */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the tournaments table */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount earned by the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("earning_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the players table */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the player */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the rating is effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)
column_names: Tier of the tournament (e.g., B, C)
Prize money awarded in the tournament
